capitalContribution.valueRequired: WELSH - Enter the total value of all monetary and non-monetary contributions
capitalContribution.twoDecimalPlaces: WELSH - Value must be a number with 2 decimal places
capitalContribution.moreThanZero: WELSH - Value must be 0.01 or more
capitalContribution.noSymbols: WELSH - Value must not include currency symbols like £, $ and €
capitalContribution.noComma: WELSH - Value must not include a comma
capitalContribution.atLeastOneType: WELSH - Select at least one type of contribution
capitalContribution.currencyRequired: WELSH - Select the currency of the capital contribution

confirm.countryMissing: WELSH - We cannot identify the country for this address. Select Change, then select the country.

address.premisesMissing: WELSH - Enter a property name or number
address.premisesLength: WELSH - Property name or number must be 200 characters or less
address.premisesInvalid: WELSH - Property name or number must only include letters a to z, numbers and common special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
address.addressLine1Missing: WELSH - Enter address line 1, typically the building and street
address.addressLine1Invalid: WELSH - Address line 1 must only include letters a to z, and common special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
address.addressLine2Invalid: WELSH - Address line 2 must only include letters a to z, and common special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
address.addressLine1Length: WELSH - Address line 1 must be 50 characters or less
address.addressLine2Length: WELSH - Address line 2 must be 50 characters or less
address.localityMissing: WELSH - Enter a town or city
address.localityInvalid: WELSH - Town or city must only include letters a to z, and common special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
address.localityLength: WELSH - Town or city must be 50 characters or less
address.regionInvalid: WELSH - County must only include letters a to z, and common special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
address.regionLength: WELSH - County must be 50 characters or less
address.postcodeInvalid: WELSH - Postcode must only include letters a to z, numbers and spaces
address.postalCodeLength: WELSH - Postcode must be 20 characters or less
address.notMainland: WELSH - Enter a UK mainland postcode
address.jurisdictionCountry: WELSH - You must enter a country that matches your jurisdiction
address.invalidCharacters: WELSH - must only include letters a to z, numbers and common special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes

dateOfUpdate.registeredOfficeAddress: WELSH - Date the registered office address changed must be the same as or after limited partnership’s registration date
dateOfUpdate.principalPlaceOfBusinessAddress: WELSH - Date the principal place of business changed must be the same as or after limited partnership’s registration date’
dateOfUpdate.partnershipName: WELSH - Date the partnership name changed must be the same as or after limited partnership’s registration date
dateOfUpdate.term: WELSH - Date the term changed must be the same as or after limited partnership’s registration date
dateOfUpdate.generalPartner: WELSH - Date the general partner changed must be the same as or after limited partnership's registration date
dateOfUpdate.limitedPartner: WELSH - Date the limited partner changed must be the same as or after limited partnership's registration date
